content.en:
A place of retreat.

Ye Tian began to forcibly fuse with his body with the power of the rules of will, which was equivalent to fusing the three aspects of the body, the will, and the innate eternal rules, which was a cultivation that only the Legendary Realm Lord was qualified to be involved in.

At this time, Ye Tian also carried out such cultivation

Airplanes!!!

A strange force seemed to be about to be born, but Ye Tian's body couldn't bear it anymore, and it seemed to be about to collapse~.

At this time, Ye Tian had been paying attention to the situation in his body.

If the body is transformed into an endless world of particles, at this moment, these three forces are intertwined in the countless particle worlds, and it is very clear

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's body collapsed little by little, but he didn't care about these at all, and was still carefully observing the changes in his body.

I don't know how long it has been, but suddenly Ye Tian noticed something strange somewhere in his body.

Somewhere in the body of the Will Source Sea barrier, the will and body here are not 100% integrated, and there is still a lack of silk, but here is in the Will Source Sea, covered by countless will power, it is difficult to detect it at all.

But now, in the process of forcibly merging the power of the will rules with the body, this place is exposed.

Boom!

Ye Tian's body burst out, but he had already found out what the problem was, and then he only needed to completely fuse this place to break the shackles and completely fuse his will and body one hundred percent, which was equivalent to stepping into the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord.

Noumenon.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian found a position and began to fuse his will with his body, this last point was difficult to fuse, and he didn't even feel that he hadn't fused yet, and there was almost no reaction at first, if he was definitely like this, otherwise he would have given up a long time ago

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian slowly sensed the problem here, and tried his best to integrate his will and body.

In this way, one after another catastrophe passed, but this last trace was extremely stubborn.

Six eternal years had passed, and Ye Tiancai had finally completely fused this last trace of it.

When the fusion was successful, Ye Tian's whole body began to transform.

Rumble!!!!!

The jump begins!

Ye Tian's Immortal Realm body is transforming into a Legendary Realm body, and the eternal power is also skyrocketing, and the willpower is soaring.

Endless Origin Energy poured into his body from the Source Sea, prompting him to break through faster.

Meanwhile.

One by one the legendary lords of the space-time territory sensed Ye Tian's breakthrough, after all, the movement was too big, and there was no cover-up, it was difficult for them to think about it.

"The Endless Ancestor broke through like this?"

Lord Ice was shocked.

Before, Ye Tian came to her to ask for advice about the breakthrough, and she couldn't give any advice, and even Tai thought that Ye Tian would stay at this sub-level for at least tens of millions of eternal years or even hundreds of millions of eternal years, which was very normal.

If you're unlucky, it's not impossible to stay in the Immortal Realm Lord.

But only a few eternal years have passed, and Ye Tian has broken through, and this speed is simply too fast.

And the other Legendary Realm Lords were even more shocked, because there had been no signs before, and they didn't even know that Ye Tian had reached the level of impacting the Legendary Realm Lords, as if all of a sudden, Ye Tian had broken through, everything was too sudden.

Ye Tian's breakthrough was not a very good thing for them, although the strength of the space-time territory had increased, but for them personally, there was a legendary realm lord who far surpassed them, and his actions would be restricted in the future, for fear that he would offend Ye Tian.

However, they couldn't stop Ye Tian from breaking through, everything was already a foregone conclusion.

After a long time, Ye Tian's realm stabilized.

-

"My strength has increased so much"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

At this moment, his body is ten times stronger, his eternal power is dozens of times stronger, and his willpower is also several times stronger.

Now, even if he doesn't use the Mixed Yuan Order, he can easily beat and even kill the Dark Mist Lord, if he borrows the Mixed Yuan Order, I'm afraid he will be able to kill the Dark Mist Lord in a short time.

What's more, he has now become a Legendary Realm Lord, able to fuse his will with the innate eternal rules, and the will itself has fused with his body, so he can try to fuse the three powers together.

At that point, he will be able to create his own Legendary Eternal Technique.

Once he masters the Legendary Eternal Technique, his strength will be greatly improved.

Of course, the Mixed Element Order can now increase his Legendary Eternal Skill to the point where it is comparable to the weaker Legendary Eternal Skill, but it is definitely not as good as the Legendary Eternal Skill.

In short, during the period of time when he had just broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord, his strength would be greatly improved.

As a result, Ye Tian continued to cultivate and improve, but the other copy bodies appeared.

For the first time, the five Legendary Realm Lords of the Time and Space Territory came to the Blood and Bone Territory to congratulate Ye Tian.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord on his arrival in the Legendary Realm Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord on his arrival in the Legendary Realm Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord on his arrival in the Legendary Realm Lord!"

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords congratulated.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian was also quite happy, and immediately invited the five Legendary Realm Lords into his palace, and a banquet began.

During this period, everyone talked about the Tao and communicated, and it took a long time to disperse.

Communicating with these five Legendary Realm Lords, Ye Tian also gained a lot, he used to know a little bit about the division of Legendary Realm Lords, but after communicating with these five Legendary Realm Lords, he became clearer about the division of strength between Legendary Realm Lords.

Immortal Realm Lords will be divided into one-step to nine-step Immortal Realm Lords according to the degree of fusion of will and body, but the Legendary Lord's realm division is different.

The legendary lord on this side of the space-time territory, the will and the body are fused, the body and the innate eternal rules are fused, and it stands to reason that the will and the innate eternal rules are also fused, but this is not the case, just like there are two yolks in an egg, the egg is the body, and the two yellows are the will and the innate eternal rules.

.0...

But.

There is no limit to the will and the innate eternal rules themselves, even if the will within the body is fused with the innate eternal rules, it can still continue to merge, and there is no end to it at all.

However, once the will in the body particles and the innate eternal rules begin to be fused, such a legendary realm lord is called the Origin Realm Legendary Lord; if the will inside the body is fully fused with the innate eternal rules, such a legendary realm lord is called the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm; if you continue to fuse the will and the innate eternal rules, although you cannot fuse with the body, after all, the body has been fused, but the innate eternal rules of the will domain are infinite, so that you can accumulate endless will rule power, when the power of the will rules accumulates to a certain extent, you can form the will rule field, and such a legendary realm lord is called a domain-level legendary lord。

For many Legendary Lords, the domain-level Legendary Lord is almost the ultimate of the Legendary Lord, but there is also a sub-level Legendary Lord, that is, the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord.

Ordinary Legendary Lords, Origin Realm Legendary Lords, Consummation Realm Legendary Lords, Realm Legendary Lords, and Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords.

This is the five realm divisions of the Legendary Lord

And the Legendary Lord who has just broken through belongs to the ordinary Legendary Lord, and Ye Tian is actually not a Legendary Lord, because he has not yet carried out the fusion of the three powers, but for him, this is easy to complete, after all, he has already begun the fusion of will and innate eternal rules.

Therefore, it didn't take long for him to become the Origin Realm Legendary Lord Nine. _
